programme.title: Un Dimanche a LA Campagne
programme.desc: A weekend together, far from the hustle and bustle of everyday life. A moment out of time to get to know one another, talk of love, friendship, life. In a house open to surprises and the unexpected, between emotion and laughter, each reveals the invisible thread of their personal story...

programme.title: Rassemblance
programme.desc: Sourdough breads, brioches and generous recipes are the keys to his success on social networks. Known under the pseudonym Cook as you feel it, Kodjo is a self-taught cook who arrived from Togo in France. A father and inspiring creator, he turns a childhood passion into a space for emancipation.

programme.title: Le Grand Spectacle De LA Fete Nationale Du Quebec 2026
programme.desc: 192nd edition of Quebec's National Holiday! An unmissable event, where artists from all backgrounds revisit the great Quebec classics.

programme.title: Des Racines Et Des ailes
programme.desc: We set off to meet some of Provence's exceptional men and women. Craftsmen, architects or chefs, they enrich the heritage and identity of their region, Provence, thanks to their skills and talent.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Luan thinks Mr. Coconuts is out for revenge when she replaces him with Lola in her act. // Hoping to drive out to the outlets to meet Lori, Leni ooks for alternative ways to get her driver's license.

programme.title: That Girl Lay Lay
programme.desc: It's Halloween and Tiffany dares Lay Lay and Sadie to stay overnight at the school in order to prove the ghost of Old Man Packer doesn't exist... or does he?

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: After Phoebe and Max let Chloe's friends watch a horror movie and eat candy, Jinx and Booch's parents want to meet Chloe's. With Hank and Barb away, Max and Phoebe transform into them to help Chloe. It goes well until the real Hank and Barb show up.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: When a report comes out that Kid Danger's super power is actually an illness, Kid Danger has to convince Swellview that it is a huge misunderstanding.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: When Ray accidentally destroys Henry's dad's prized remote control car, they throw a manicure/pedicure party to raise money to fix it.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: Danger Force is hired by Rivalton's Duke Wellington to protect him and his ponytail from his jealous uncle, Archduke Fernando. They at first think it's easy money, until they find out The Archduke hired Ray and Henry Hart to capture Duke Wellington.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Sam overhears Freddie confess to Carly that he's never kissed a girl, then exposes his secret on the webshow. Gibby and Carly train Spencer for a tryout with the local professional football team.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: The gang runs a contest on iCarly -- the prize is a new car courtesy of a local dealership. After Nevel wins, the kids discover that the dealership had no knowledge of the contest or the free car they were supposedly donating.

programme.title: Victorious
programme.desc: Tori struggles to find the perfect birthday gift for Trina, then decides to write her sister a song as a present. An ungrateful Trina turns the song into cash by selling it, enraging Tori.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Sam gets a job as the assistant to the huge rap star Peezy B. Cat finds babysitting much more challenging without Sam around to help.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: With all his family and friends under Kitsune's mind control, Raph no longer wants to fight in the Mutant Battle Arena. But he'll have to (with Pigeon Pete's help) in order to save EVERYONE he loves before it's too late!

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: The Mutanimals turn on the Ninja Turtles after Ray Fillet accuses them of attacking him in Central Park! The Turtles realize a mutant snapping turtle named Tokka is on the loose, drawing Donnie to a terrifying laboratory on Staten Island!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Squidward take a delivery to a dreaded town where the laws of logic no longer apply. // SpongeBob can't stop biting his nails, but he also can't figure out why!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton's giant Chum Bucket glove runs wild in town, but SpongeBob has a handy friend to help them out. // SpongeBob takes his first break ever at work, but how will he spend his precious time?

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Thinking she hasn't been invited to Bibi's party Jade sneaks in. // Mica doesn't finish his robot in time for the school science fair, so the Marsupilamis squeeze inside and operate it.

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: When Diamondo refuses to give the twins a ride in his spaceship they embark on some space exploration of their own. // Best becomes entangled in a series of awkward situations when he pretends to know someone he's never met before.

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Bester unwittingly uncovers the not so delicious goings on in Fritz Fritter's top secret Donut Wonderland Factory. // Best and Bester dig up Captain Ironfoot's Cursed Amulet on the beach only to find that Deep Sea Belle wants it too.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: After Patrick eats life-threatening chum, SpongeBob helps him check off his bucket list. // Patrick devolves back into a baby so he can keep his childhood toys.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: In a Patrick Show episode about boats, Cecil teaches Patrick how to drive. // Patrick time-travels in a race for the Krusty Krab's newest menu item.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Cecil works a new temp job as a security guard at Lady Upturn's art museum.

programme.title: Sonic Prime
programme.desc: Before the Prism Battle, Shadow and Sonic go head-to-head in an epic fight. In present-day New Yoke City, the Chaos Council discover Sonic's mysterious connection to their own coveted power source and plan to extract it by any means necessary.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: Max and Phoebe attend Parent-Teacher Night, leaving Chloe and friends home without adult supervision. When Jinx finds the Air Lair, he believes spies are targeting the school, and his meddling puts the Thundermans' school jobs at risk.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: After Schwoz's experiment-gone-wrong causes an infestation at Sw.A.G, Danger Force enrolls at Swellview Junior High and stumbles into an extra-curricular crime wave.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Captain Man reveals a "Crimefighters Only" room in the Man Cave. Jealous, Charlotte, Jasper and Schwoz make a cooler room to show them up. As the gang fights over who gets the better room, things get blown out of proportion.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln is given the responsibility of taking home his classes’ tarantula, but it gets loose and wreaks havoc! // Thinking he has the worst chores, Lincoln decides to go on strike until someone will swap chores with him.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln is going to his first rock concert, and Luna is determined to make it the greatest experience ever. // Lincoln finds a letter in the attic leading him to believe there is money hidden within the Loud house!

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Flip sees a lucrative business opportunity when he discovers Nacho has the ability to predict the weather.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward's amazing new life in witness protection is threatened after SpongeBob and Patrick discover his whereabouts. // While stuck in her dome, Sandy suspects Plankton's up to no good and recruits Patrick to investigate.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob goes to extreme lengths to trick Gary into going to the vet. // SpongeBob become desperate when he accidentally gets pinned under his exercise equipment and must wait for help to arrive.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Rube hosts an episode of "FUN-Believable! With Rube" where he explores little known oddities and attractions around Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After failing to make Chef Guy Grazer a meal on his show, the kids try to erase the footage before it airs. // The kids search all over Royal Woods to find the missing furniture they left outside while cleaning.

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When the kids break Mom and Dad's priceless vase, they decide the only thing to do is go back in time to their wedding day, and prevent them from ever receiving it.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: The family throws Jack a goodbye party, but he only cares about impressing his mom if she comes to Canyon Valley. // The end of the summer has arrived and the kids go on a wild adventure to get Jack to the airport on time.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: Jack & Lily are half-siblings living on opposite ends of the world both hoping to have the "best summer ever." When dangerous events forces Jack's mom to send him to live with his dad, the kids fear their summer dreams have become a nightmare.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: The Gal Pals take Pearl to a cabin in the woods for a weekend of silly pranks. // Mr. Krabs has a secret taste for something surprising.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick create their own zoo made entirely of bubbles! // The Krusty Krab goes under emergency quarantine, but no one knows who carries the mysterious illness.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: Missing fame and fans, Max decides to recapture some glory by breaking Booch's sandwich-stacking record at Splat by the Sea, but Chloe challenges him so that her friend can have her record back.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: Chloe must attend summer school, and Max is assigned to be her teacher. While they will be busy all summer, Phoebe decides to go solo on missions. She meets a new superhero named Captain Perfect, and discovers they make a good crime-fighting team.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: Chapa, Miles, Mika, and Bose are thrilled to have landed dates for the once-every-twenty-years SwellMelonFest until threats come in prompting Ray to make them work security. The threats become a reality when the kids must fight The Cell at the event.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: Danger Force is crushing it at Swellview Junior High, but Ray misses his sidekicks and schemes to get them out of school.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Ray has trusted Henry and Charlotte with protecting Swellview while he’s out of town at his cousin's wedding. Problems arise when they find themselves having to handle things on their own.

programme.title: That Girl Lay Lay
programme.desc: Sadie and Lay Lay are determined to find Principal Willingham a date so she'll approve a school dance, but disagree on who her date should be. Separately, they set out on their own match-making missions to prove who is right.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.
